title: Define report inputs
instruction: Confirm report period, audience, departments, required KPI categories, and fetch mock KPI data for the current and previous periods.

title: Validate and normalize KPIs
instruction: Validate KPI data for freshness, missing values, duplicate rows, and unit consistency, then normalize values into common formats such as currency, percentage, count, or duration.

title: Analyze metric changes
instruction: Calculate period-over-period changes, flag material movements, detect anomalies using thresholds, unusual swings, or missing expected activity, and write department notes explaining what changed and why it matters.

title: Publish report package
instruction: Draft the executive summary with wins, risks, and decisions needed; draft the distribution email with highlights and owner-specific follow-ups; archive report metadata through MOCK_REPORT_API; and return KPI summary, anomaly list, department notes, email draft, archive result, and data gaps.
